author_identification.canonical_name_ar: إسماعيل بن عمر بن كثير القرشي الدمشقي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent historian and exegete, known for his comprehensive works in history and Quranic commentary.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A major work in Islamic historiography, covering the history from the beginning of creation to the author's time.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the most important historical works in the Islamic tradition, widely referenced and studied.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. Abdullah bin Abdul Mohsin al-Turki is a respected scholar and editor known for his meticulous work on classical Islamic texts.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The edition is based on a critical review of multiple manuscripts and includes annotations and explanations to aid understanding.
